jobs.title: ⚐ Side ændret: dk-sla
jobs.snippet: Career | Come and change the world with us — SLA Change to english Change to english Contact Studio Services Challenges Cases News Perspectives Career Contact Business inquiry Line Agnes Bjørløw Skjærlund Head of Business Development, Associate Partner +45 28708968 lan@sla.dk Press inquiry Kristoffer Holm Pedersen Communications Director +45 6080 9394 khp@sla.dk Career SLA is an internationally renowned nature-based design studio with offices in Copenhagen, Aarhus, and Oslo. Together, we are 130 landscape architects, biologists, anthropologists, lighting designers, architects, planting experts, philosophers, and city planners who collaborate on designing cities, public spaces, and nature on all scales. We are constantly looking for talented, curious, fun, and driven colleagues with green hearts and minds who want to design the best possible places for life – all life. Come join us! Open positions Location Role Copenhagen Job — Office Assistants Contact Want to send us an unsolicited application? Or do you have questions about open positions? We will be happy to receive both. Please send them to us via hr@sla.dk As a data protection measure, we retain your application for a maximum of six months. Internship Are you a student and would you like to experience daily life at SLA? Then you can apply for an internship with us. We offer full-time internships twice a year at our offices in Aarhus and Copenhagen and once a year at our Oslo office – starting in the summer. Keep an eye open for new postings here and on social media. Due to collective agreements, we can’t accept anyone with a master’s degree for an internship position – you must be an active student. Unfortunately, we can not offer summer internships. Everyday studio life Everyday studio life in our Copenhagen, Oslo and Aarhus studios A collective of green hearts Image from an SLA Camp, where all 130 of us gathered Working at SLA We believe in a distinctly multidisciplinary approach to making livable and resilient cities and value being a diverse workforce. Together, we are more than 130 landscape designers, architects, urban planners, lighting designers, anthropologists, biologists, sociologists, computational designers, planting specialists, R&D/PhDs, philosophers, microclimate designers, and BIM managers working together to enrich projects with their interdisciplinary knowledge. In SLA, we are driven by a genuine desire to understand and change the world. The studio is constantly seeking new insight
jobs.verdict: Dette er en generel karriereside uden et specifikt stillingsopslag, så det kan ikke scores.

PDF / Drucken Teilen Veröffentlichungsdatum: Vor 30+ Tagen veröffentlicht Stellenbeschreibung Projektassistenz für das Förderprogramm Quartiersimpulse (W/M/D) 15 Wochenstunden befristet auf 2 Jahre Ziel des Förderprogramms ist es, lebendige Quartiere zu gestalten, in denen sich Menschen einbringen, Verantwortung übernehmen, sich wertschätzen und gegenseitig unterstützen. Der Schwerpunkt des Projekts liegt im Themenfeld „Pflege und Unterstützung im Alter“. Wir suchen ein neues, engagiertes Teammitglied mit Interesse an einer vielseitigen und anspruchsvollen Aufgabe im Bereich Quartiersmanagement und sozialer Stadtentwicklung. jobs.verdict: Rollen er sikkerhedsledelse i et EU-rumfartsagentur, hvilket ligger langt fra Louis kernekompetencer inden for borgerinddragelse, migration og lokalsamfundsudvikling

jobs.title: Sous Chef at Urban Italian Group
jobs.snippet:
Passion & Leadership: Sous Chef at Urban Italian Group
Do you have what it takes to be the indispensable right-hand in one of Scandinavia’s most innovative hospitality groups? Urban Italian Group is seeking a passionate Sous Chef to support our Head Chef, lead our kitchen brigade and help create unforgettable dining experiences.
About Us
Urban Italian Group is the creative's behind the popular Basta casual dining concept and the sophisticated Florentine brand. With 11 restaurants across Sweden and Spain, we serve authentic Italian hospitality to over 3,000 guests daily. Our diverse team of 500 culinary professionals from 53 nationalities is as dynamic as our menu – blending passion, innovation, and a love for great food.

Our portfolio includes several distinct restaurant concepts: 
Basta is our casual dining brand, focused on delivering high-quality guest experiences in beautifully designed environments with strong value for the guest. The concept is suitable for the everyday experience, all from family’s to date nights. Basta have today 10 established restaurants across Sweden.  
Florentine is an more upscale trattoria than Basta, offering refined relaxed luxury experiences in glamorous settings inspired by 70’s italy. Today Florentine is established in Stockholm, Marbella and soon also in Madrid. 
Trattoria Giorgio’s is a new multi-unit Italian concept launched in late 2025, this is our local neighborhood version of an Italian restaurant. The single unit is today located in Östermalm, Stockholm. 
Lola Maria, is our first Spanish concept, and is our love letter to the Andalusia region. The concept is focusing on social dining with tapas, quality wines and creative cocktails. 
In May 2026, we will also open our new concept Villa Valentina in Slussen, Stockholm. This will be a modern Spanish farmhouse restaurant inspired by Mediterranean warmth and community around food. The location is seen as the best restaurant spot in Sweden, and is our biggest establishment in Stockholm so far.
Growth & Expansion
We are in an exciting phase of growth. Basta is expanding towards 18 locations in Sweden by 2030, while Florentine continues its international journey with openings in Madrid, Berlin and Oslo. Apart from this we expanding the UIG portfolio with more unique concept.
